CTN 4, 011 [Enuma Anu Enlil Varia][via cams/gkab]

Column ii
(start of column missing)
r ii 1'r 1'

[... x]-KAM ⸢GE₆⸣ [...]

[...]th [day] it is black [...].

r ii 2'2'

[...] ina ŠA₃-šu₂ [...]

[...] inside it [...].

r ii 3'3'

[... x]-KAM EN U₄ 14-KAM IGI.BAR ina ITI ⸢BI⸣ [...]

[...]th [day] until the 14th day it appears: in that month [...].

r ii 4'4'

[...] ⸢TA⸣ U₄ 10-KAM EN U₄ 12-KAM U₄.DA-⸢su?⸣ x x [...]

[...] from the 10th day until the 12th day its light ... [...].

r ii 5'5'

* 30 TA U₄ 10-KAM EN U₄ 14-KAM : U₄ 15-KAM ina ŠA₃-šu₂ [...]

(If) the Moon from the 10th day until the 14th day (or): the 15th day inside it [...].

r ii 6'6'

* 30 ina U₄ 10-KAM IGI.BAR GE₆ ina ITI BI AN.GE₆ [...]

(If) the Moon appears on the 10th day (and) is black: in that month an eclipse [...].

r ii 7'7'

* 30 TA U₄ 11-KAM IGI.BAR x x x x RU ina ŠA₃-šu₂ AN.GE₆ ⸢GAR⸣[an]

(If) the Moon appears from the 11th day and .... inside it: an eclipse will take place.

r ii 8'8'

MUD ga-la-tu₃ MUD da-aʾ-mu AGA GE₆ GAR-ma

MUD (means) trembling. MUD (means) dark. A black corona will take place.

r ii 9'9'

* 30 TA U₄ 12-KAM GE₆ ina ŠA₃-šu₂ AN.GE₆ GARan

(If) the Moon is dark inside it from the 12th day: an eclipse will take place.

r ii 10'10'

* 30 U₄ 12-KAM x x [...] ŠA₃-šu₂ GE₆ AN.⸢GE₆⸣

(If) the Moon on the 12th day ... inside it is black: eclipse.

r ii 11'11'

* 30 U₄ 12-⸢KAM⸣ [...] ITI BI AN.GE₆ GARan

(If) the Moon on the 12th day [...]: that month an eclipse will take place.

r ii 12'12'

* 30 ⸢U₄ 12⸣-[KAM ...] ⸢ITI⸣ BI AN.GE₆ GARan

(If) the Moon on the 12th day [...]: that month an eclipse will take place.

r ii 13'13'

[...] U₄ x-[KAM ...] ⸢ma⸣-gal ZALAG-ma

[...] on the nth day [...] shines greatly and

r ii 14'14'

[...] AN.GE₆ GARan

[...]: an eclipse will take place.

r ii 15'15'

[...] x AN.GE₆ x GARan

[...] ...: a ... eclipse will take place.

r ii 16'16'

[...] x AGA ŠE ŠA₂ KU [...]

[...] ... [...]

r ii 17'17'

[...] x x x ḪA x x [...]

[...] ... [...]

r ii 18'18'

[...] GABA.RI x [...]

[...] ... [...]

[...] DU ZA NA RU DA SI ME [...]
